global_negative_prompt_notes_zh: 避免现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻 UI、网红脸、过度磨皮、塑料 CG、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、无来源灾民、把虫族层级混成同一种怪物、让白册文字随机生成、视频涂抹、花屏、压缩块、局部融化、糊脸、手指融化和关键轮廓糊掉。
global_negative_prompt_notes_en: Avoid modern clothing, modern architecture, firearms, sci-fi UI, influencer faces, over-smoothed skin, plastic CG, floaty slow motion, stiff posing, source-less refugees, mixing all insect hierarchy into one monster type, random generated register text, video smearing, glitching, compression blocks, local melting, blurred faces, melted fingers and blurred key silhouettes.

prompts.prompt_zh: 锁喉关外墙暴雪夜，镜头从墙外攻城方向低机位正向偏斜建立兽潮压城：C020/C021/E01_C020 兽族与伴生兽、攻城车或破门猛犸压向同一面黑石城门；裂云冷白带淡金天光从左上或侧后切出城墙、攻城器械、巨兽轮廓和骨钟边缘，撞门瞬间冷白雪雾成为最亮区域，低位暗红火点只做边缘反打。镜头低位前推并轻微上仰，终点是第一次重撞城门和骨钟横摆，不越过墙头、不转到墙后。全程只有一面城墙、一个城门、一个钟架、一口钟。
prompts.prompt_en: Blizzard at Suohou Gate outer wall. The camera begins outside the wall from a low front-biased oblique siege angle: C020/C021/E01_C020 beast troops and companion beasts, siege cart or gate-breaking mammoth press toward the same blackstone gate. Storm-break cold-white sky light with a faint pale-gold edge cuts the wall, siege engine, beast silhouettes and bone-bell rim from upper-left or side-back; the cold-white snow blast at impact is the brightest zone, with low dark-red fire only as edge counterlight. The camera pushes low and tilts slightly up, ending on the first heavy gate impact and swinging bell, without crossing the wall or turning behind it. One wall, one gate, one bell frame, one bell throughout.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要第二道城墙、远处城墙、第二个钟架、第二只钟、钟架方向变化、90度转向、越墙到背面、城墙两边都被攻击、城外人族、兽族看镜头列队、完全对称正面城门、纯骨钟特写、完整圆形徽章、全画面灰黑、雪雾糊成灰白罩、视频涂抹、花屏、压缩块、局部融化、关键轮廓糊掉、不可读兽群。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No second wall, distant wall, second bell frame, second bell, changed bell-frame direction, 90-degree turn, crossing behind the wall, both sides under attack, humans outside the wall, beast troops posing toward camera, perfectly symmetrical frontal gate, pure bell close-up, complete circular emblem, uniformly grey-black image, snow haze as grey veil, video smearing, glitching, compression blocks, local melting, blurred key silhouettes, unreadable beast mass.

prompts.prompt_zh: 年轻灰墙军户被撞门余震晃倒，半倒在同一墙头黑石女墙边，肩背撞墙，身体重心失衡；一只手撑住墙边或雪泥，另一只手刚松开断矛或长矛残杆，武器脱手斜滑进前景雪泥。旁边同一口骨钟和钟架正在横摆，锁链拉紧、木架抖雪。左上或侧后裂云冷白带淡金天光给钟架、锁链、头盔、肩甲、脱手武器和雪粒轮廓；撞门方向反射冷白雪雾亮部，低位暗红火只勾手指、武器边缘、钟缘和冻血，黑墙负补光压住暗面。
prompts.prompt_en: The young grey-wall soldier is knocked down by the gate-impact aftershock, half-collapsed beside the same wall-top blackstone parapet, shoulder and back against the wall, body weight unstable; one hand braces on wall edge or snow mud, the other has just released a broken spear or spear shaft, and the weapon slips diagonally into foreground snow mud. The same bone bell and bell frame swing beside him, chain taut and wooden frame shedding snow. Storm-break cold-white sky light with a faint pale-gold edge from upper-left or side-back rims the bell frame, chains, helmet, shoulder armor, dropped weapon and snow grains; cold-white snow-haze bounce from the gate-impact direction creates the highlight, low dark-red fire only edges fingers, weapon, bell rim and frozen blood, while black-wall negative fill presses the dark side.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要扶钟姿势、不要跪着摆拍、不要手掌贴钟圣物化、不要强光圣徽、不要英雄化摆拍、不要全画面灰黑、不要无主光方向、不要雪雾糊成灰白罩、不要视频涂抹、不要花屏、不要压缩块、不要局部融化、不要糊脸、不要手指融化、不要甲片粘连、不要钟架变形、不要正脸变形特写、不要过度血腥。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No bell-bracing pose, no kneeling tableau, no sacred palm-on-bell framing, no bright sacred emblem, no heroic posing, no uniformly grey-black image, no missing key-light direction, no snow haze as grey veil, no video smearing, no glitching, no compression blocks, no local melting, no blurred face, no melted fingers, no fused armor plates, no warped bell frame, no deformed front-face close-up, no excessive gore.

prompts.prompt_zh: 薛临墙在黑石墙缝前低声提醒敌人逼近，语气压低、急促但不慌，冻裂粗手压住墙体裂纹，灰石厚衬袄和旧甲片覆雪；战场口令中近景强调可读性，冷白暴雪主光只给额骨、鼻梁和手背硬冷边，黑墙负补光吞掉半张脸，远处火线低位暖边集中切出侧脸、手和旧甲片，雪雾烟尘把枪线与门线分层。
prompts.prompt_en: Xue Linqiang gives a low warning that the enemy is coming up, his tone low, urgent but controlled, cracked broad hand pressing the wall crack, grey padded coat and old armor plates dusted with snow; the battlefield-command close-medium shot emphasizes readability, cold blizzard key light gives only a hard cold edge on brow, nose bridge and hand back, black-wall negative fill swallows half the face, low distant fireline tightly cuts the side profile, hand and old armor plates, and snow-smoke haze layers spear line and gate line.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要老宗师姿势、不要武侠强光、不要神圣英雄逆光、不要把他画成将军华甲、不要口型融化、不要脸部花屏、不要眼鼻漂移、不要手指糊成团、不要背景枪线糊成灰块。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No grandmaster pose, no wuxia power glow, no divine heroic backlight, do not turn him into an ornate general, no melted mouth shape, no face glitching, no drifting eyes or nose, no clumped fingers, no background spear line blurred into grey blocks.

prompts.prompt_zh: 从锁喉关战争压力切到金河征粮制度：用粮袋墙、小吏高位、低位村民和白册夹板建立“粮食已被制度占领”的空间秩序。清晨麦金冷雾里，金河粮袋堆成墙，检查台上的虫族粮税小吏穿蜡灰青短官袍、戴高账吏帽，胸前白册夹板、骨算盘、粮牌和旧铁秤钩随动作轻晃；村民排在低处，粮车和湿木检查口保持成组轮廓。横屏远景按上下层级构图：粮袋墙占上半画面并压低天空，粮税小吏站在检查台高位偏中，白册夹板、骨算盘和粮牌形成亮色制度中心；村民被压成下方窄带，押车通道从右前向左后退进，保留粮仓纵深。柔和清晨冷雾作主环境光，低角度逆光穿过粮尘切出粮袋墙、小吏高帽和白册轮廓，窄侧光擦过麻布、湿木和河泥纹理；虫蜡白只作为白册和粮牌的小亮点。少量丁达尔光用于粮尘纵深，不能做成特效光柱。从村民眼高真实速度缓慢推进，推进时粮尘和人群只轻微让开，终点停在粮税小吏与白册夹板的层级关系上，不升空、不追美景。
prompts.prompt_en: Cut from border war pressure into the Jinhe grain-tax system: use the grain-sack wall, high clerk position, low villagers and white register board to establish that grain has already been occupied by bureaucracy. In wheat-gold cold morning haze, Jinhe grain sacks form a wall. The insect grain tax clerk on the inspection platform wears a wax-grey-blue short robe and tall account hat; the white register board, bone abacus, grain tags and old iron scale hook sway lightly on his chest. Villagers queue low, while carts and the wet-wood inspection gate remain grouped silhouettes. Landscape wide composition built on vertical hierarchy: the grain-sack wall occupies the upper half and suppresses the sky, the grain tax clerk stands high near center on the inspection platform, and the white register board, bone abacus and grain tags form the bright bureaucratic center; villagers are compressed into a low band, while the cart lane recedes from front-right to rear-left for depot depth. Soft morning cold haze acts as the ambient key. Low-angle backlight passes through grain dust to rim the sack wall, clerk hat and register board, while a narrow side light grazes burlap, wet wood and river-mud texture; insect-wax white stays as small highlights on the register and grain tags. Subtle Tyndall light may deepen grain-dust space, never becoming VFX beams. A slow real-time push from villager eye height; grain dust and crowd layers only part slightly as the camera moves, ending on the hierarchy between clerk and white register board, with no crane move or beauty-plate drift.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要现代仓库、现代服饰、枪械、科幻 UI、人族账房先生版小吏、欢乐蒸汽朋克、全画面灰色灾民营、无主光方向、过度丁达尔光柱、魔法光柱、过曝 bloom、随机可读白册文字、随机徽记、黄色闪粉、数字颗粒、全局假锐化、塑料麻袋、远景群众逐个清晰、视频涂抹、花屏、压缩块。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: avoid modern warehouse, modern clothing, firearms, sci-fi UI, human-accountant clerk, cheerful steampunk, all-grey refugee camp, missing key-light direction, excessive Tyndall beams, magic light shafts, overexposed bloom, random readable register text, random emblems, yellow glitter, digital speckle, global fake sharpening, plastic sacks, individually sharp distant crowd, video smearing, glitches, compression blocks.

subject.zh: 清晨麦金冷雾里，金河粮袋堆成墙，检查台上的虫族粮税小吏穿蜡灰青短官袍、戴高账吏帽，胸前白册夹板、骨算盘、粮牌和旧铁秤钩随动作轻晃；村民排在低处，粮车和湿木检查口保持成组轮廓。
subject.en: In wheat-gold cold morning haze, Jinhe grain sacks form a wall. The insect grain tax clerk on the inspection platform wears a wax-grey-blue short robe and tall account hat; the white register board, bone abacus, grain tags and old iron scale hook sway lightly on his chest. Villagers queue low, while carts and the wet-wood inspection gate remain grouped silhouettes.

composition.zh: 横屏远景按上下层级构图：粮袋墙占上半画面并压低天空，粮税小吏站在检查台高位偏中，白册夹板、骨算盘和粮牌形成亮色制度中心；村民被压成下方窄带，押车通道从右前向左后退进，保留粮仓纵深。
composition.en: Landscape wide composition built on vertical hierarchy: the grain-sack wall occupies the upper half and suppresses the sky, the grain tax clerk stands high near center on the inspection platform, and the white register board, bone abacus and grain tags form the bright bureaucratic center; villagers are compressed into a low band, while the cart lane recedes from front-right to rear-left for depot depth.

camera.zh: 从村民眼高真实速度缓慢推进，推进时粮尘和人群只轻微让开，终点停在粮税小吏与白册夹板的层级关系上，不升空、不追美景。
camera.en: A slow real-time push from villager eye height; grain dust and crowd layers only part slightly as the camera moves, ending on the hierarchy between clerk and white register board, with no crane move or beauty-plate drift.

lighting_color.zh: 柔和清晨冷雾作主环境光，低角度逆光穿过粮尘切出粮袋墙、小吏高帽和白册轮廓，窄侧光擦过麻布、湿木和河泥纹理；虫蜡白只作为白册和粮牌的小亮点。少量丁达尔光用于粮尘纵深，不能做成特效光柱。
lighting_color.en: Soft morning cold haze acts as the ambient key. Low-angle backlight passes through grain dust to rim the sack wall, clerk hat and register board, while a narrow side light grazes burlap, wet wood and river-mud texture; insect-wax white stays as small highlights on the register and grain tags. Subtle Tyndall light may deepen grain-dust space, never becoming VFX beams.

style_continuity.zh: 粮税小吏必须是虫族低阶官僚，不是人族账房或普通衙役；白册只显示留白、浅刻线或后合成区域，不生成可读文字。粮仓不能变成现代仓库或灰色灾民营，麦金、河泥褐、湿木灰和虫蜡白要分材质。
style_continuity.en: The grain tax clerk must remain an insect low-ranking bureaucrat, not a human accountant or ordinary magistrate; the white register only shows blank areas, shallow guide lines or post-composite spaces, no readable text. The depot must not become a modern warehouse or grey refugee camp; wheat gold, river-mud brown, wet wood grey and insect-wax white stay materially separated.

quality_intent.zh: 去粒子化真实材质，前中后景分层清楚，光线服务制度压迫和材质触感，不靠随机文字或特效光解释剧情。
quality_intent.en: De-particleized photoreal materials, clear foreground/midground/background separation, lighting serves bureaucratic pressure and tactile texture, never relying on random text or effect beams to explain the story.

prompts.prompt_zh: 把征粮制度压到家庭门槛：半斗杂粮、祖牌小盒、孩子虫蜡手印和奴兵扣腕同框，让“家门被写没”变成可见动作。混血奴兵的骨白腕绑和手从侧面压入画面，掀倒空粮缸，只滚出半斗杂粮；老人护住祖牌小盒被按进泥里，孩子小手被迫按上虫蜡封条。衣物是金河农户旧粗布和劳动补丁，表演克制、沉重、不血腥。门槛压迫特写组用斜线构图：前景是倒出的半斗杂粮、湿泥和祖牌小盒，画面一侧切入奴兵骨白腕绑和扣腕手，孩子手印落在虫蜡封条上；老人和孩子只给局部姿态，不做猎奇正脸。背景保留粮袋墙和低位人群的模糊压力。门外清晨柔光托住人物安全感，窄侧光从门槛斜切，强化湿泥、木缸、粗布、祖牌盒和奴兵腕绑纹理；虫蜡封条上有小面积冷白顶光，制造制度压迫，但避开孩子眼窝。底光只允许作为泥水反光的极弱火场感，不大面积使用。手持后退一步，跟随粮缸被掀、老人护盒和手被按下的真实接触反作用；运动短、低、近，动作完成后立刻稳住。
prompts.prompt_en: Push the grain-tax system onto the household threshold: half-measure grain, ancestral tablet box, child wax handprint and slave-soldier grip share the frame so the erasure of the household becomes a visible action. A mixed-blood slave soldier hand with bone-white wrist binding presses into frame from the side, tipping an empty grain jar that releases only half a measure of grain. An elder guarding the ancestral tablet box is forced into mud, and a child hand is pressed onto an insect-wax seal. Clothes are Jinhe coarse work cloth with repairs; performance is restrained, heavy and non-gory. The coercive threshold close-up uses diagonal pressure: foreground holds spilled half-measure grain, wet mud and the ancestral tablet box; one side of frame cuts in the slave soldier bone-white wrist binding and gripping hand, with the child handprint on the insect-wax seal. Elder and child are shown as partial body language, not exploitative front faces. Background keeps a blurred pressure of grain sacks and low crowd. Soft morning light from outside preserves restraint around the people, while a narrow side light cuts across the threshold to strengthen wet mud, wooden jar, coarse cloth, tablet box and slave-soldier wrist-binding textures. A small cold-white top light sits on the insect-wax seal to create bureaucratic oppression without darkening the child eye sockets. Bottom light is only a faint mud-water reflection, never broad. A one-step handheld pullback follows the real contact reaction of the jar tipped over, the elder guarding the box and the hand pressed down; the move is short, low and close, settling as soon as the action lands.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要直观伤害儿童、不要血腥、不要恐怖片底光大面积照脸、不要奴兵变纯怪物、不要奴兵开白册、不要祖牌盒变成华丽祭器、不要现代陶瓷或塑料桶、不要随机文字、不要猎奇正脸、不要夸张哭喊、不要全画面硬闪光、不要黄色闪粉、数字颗粒、视频涂抹、手指融化、道具粘连。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: avoid explicit child harm, gore, broad horror bottom-light on faces, pure-monster slave soldier, slave soldier opening the register, ornate shrine-like tablet box, modern ceramic or plastic bucket, random text, exploitative front faces, exaggerated crying, full-frame hard flash, yellow glitter, digital speckle, video smearing, melted fingers, fused props.

subject.zh: 混血奴兵的骨白腕绑和手从侧面压入画面，掀倒空粮缸，只滚出半斗杂粮；老人护住祖牌小盒被按进泥里，孩子小手被迫按上虫蜡封条。衣物是金河农户旧粗布和劳动补丁，表演克制、沉重、不血腥。

style_continuity.zh: 奴兵只负责扣腕、押车、执行，不开册；祖牌小盒、粮牌封蜡和粮缸属于家庭/制度道具线。儿童威胁必须克制，不能出现直观伤害、血腥或猎奇表情。

prompts.prompt_zh: 让“查清明籍”的话术变成可见制度动作：白册、族谱行留白、节状手指、封牌和被扣妇人一起说明家粮被写成官粮。粮税小吏翻开白册，节状手指点过族谱行留白，封牌小槌落在粮袋旁；妇人护住过冬粮被奴兵从侧后扣住手腕或前臂。小吏高位冷静，奴兵低位执行，妇人和村民被压低。册页只允许留白、浅刻线、遮罩或后合成区域，不能生成随机可读字。检查桌中景按“前景证据、中景执行、背景压力”三层构图：前景高细节是白册册页、节状手指、粮牌、虫蜡封条、骨算盘和湿木桌沿；中景是粮税小吏高帽、被扣妇人、奴兵扣腕和粮袋侧面；背景只保留粮袋墙、检查口、低位村民和清晨冷雾。虫蜡白顶光压在白册和小吏脸壳上，形成冷酷制度感，并故意让小吏眼窝更暗；但用窄侧光擦亮节状手指、妇人手腕、旧木桌纹、粮袋麻布和奴兵皮甲，保证皮肤/甲片/石木纹理可读。小槌落点可用小面积硬光，逆光只给高帽、肩线和冷雾轮廓，避免圣光化。静态制度镜头，正面略高于桌沿，只有手、封牌小槌、妇人护粮和奴兵扣腕移动；台词只表现说话状态，不让模型生成字幕或口型精确文字。
prompts.prompt_en: Turn the Qingming-register speech into a visible bureaucratic action: the register, blank genealogy rows, segmented finger, seal tag and pinned woman show household grain being rewritten as state grain. The grain tax clerk opens the white register, segmented finger crossing blank genealogy rows, and a seal-tag hammer lands beside the grain sack. A woman guarding winter grain is gripped at wrist or forearm from side-rear by a slave soldier. The clerk stays high and calm, the soldier executes below, and woman and villagers are compressed low. Register pages only allow blank space, shallow guide lines, masks or post-composite areas, never random readable text. The medium inspection-table shot uses three layers: foreground evidence, midground enforcement, background pressure. Foreground high detail holds register pages, segmented fingers, grain tag, insect-wax seal, bone abacus and wet-wood table edge; midground holds the clerk tall hat, pinned woman, slave-soldier grip and grain sack side; background keeps only grain-sack wall, inspection opening, low villagers and morning cold haze. Cold insect-wax top light presses onto the register and clerk face shell, creating a cruel bureaucratic feeling and deliberately darkening the clerk eye sockets; a narrow side light still grazes segmented fingers, the woman wrist, old table grain, burlap sack and slave-soldier leather armor so skin, armor and wood textures remain readable. The seal-hammer landing point may take a small hard highlight; backlight only rims hat, shoulders and cold haze, never becoming sacred. A locked bureaucratic frame, frontal and slightly above table edge; only hands, seal-hammer, the woman guarding grain and slave-soldier grip move. Dialogue is only a speaking state, with no generated subtitles or exact lip text.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要混淆官吏和奴兵职责、不要人族账房版小吏、不要白册随机可读文字、不要字幕入画、不要封牌变魔法符、不要奴兵抢主位、不要妇人变华丽贵族、不要全画面顶光黑眼窝导致脸不可读、不要圣光逆光、不要大面积底光、不要过硬假舞台光、不要黄色闪粉、数字颗粒、塑料皮肤、手指融化、脸部花屏、道具比例漂移。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: avoid mixing clerk and slave-soldier duties, human-accountant clerk, random readable register text, subtitles in frame, magic-symbol seal tag, slave soldier taking the main official position, woman turning into an ornate noble, full-frame top light making faces unreadable, sacred backlight, broad bottom light, fake hard stage lighting, yellow glitter, digital speckle, plastic skin, melted fingers, face glitches, drifting prop scale.

style_continuity.zh: 官吏、奴兵、金河家庭三种身份层级必须分明；白册、粮牌、虫蜡封条和骨算盘是制度道具，不是魔法特效。视频只表现说话状态，精确对白来自字幕和配音。
style_continuity.en: Clerk, slave soldier and Jinhe household identities must remain distinct; the white register, grain tag, insect-wax seal and bone abacus are bureaucratic props, not magic effects. Video only shows speaking state; exact dialogue belongs to subtitles and voice.

prompts.prompt_zh: 用押车离开完成征粮制度结果：粮袋被拖走，祖牌小盒和虫蜡手印留在泥里，旁白落下“良户成逃籍”。押车奴兵把粮袋拖上木车，车轮从祖牌小盒旁压过泥水；妇人跪在门槛边，孩子手印仍粘着虫蜡白。首帧读到粮袋刚被拖上车，终帧读到粮车离开后的空门槛、车辙和冷雾，情绪克制，不做英雄追车或夸张哭喊。FLF2V 首帧到终帧使用同一门槛后方三分构图：首帧前景是祖牌小盒、虫蜡冷白手印和泥水，粮袋正被拖上车；中景妇人与孩子低在门槛，奴兵和车轮横向离开；终帧车已退到远处冷雾里，前景仍是空门槛、祖牌盒和车辙，家门还在但家粮不在。清晨低角逆光从押车离开的方向打出粮袋、车轮、奴兵肩线和冷雾轮廓，增加电影感和空气感；侧光掠过泥水、车辙、祖牌盒和麻袋，强化触感。妇人和孩子只吃柔和天光，不用硬光审判；虫蜡手印保持小面积冷白亮点。丁达尔光只沿车道给纵深，不能盖住家门。粮车和奴兵横向离开，镜头不追车，固定在家门后方并极慢后收，强调“粮走了，家留空”；尾段让车轮声盖过哭声。
prompts.prompt_en: Complete the result of the grain-tax system through the cart leaving: sacks are dragged away, ancestral tablet box and wax handprint remain in mud, and voiceover lands that a lawful household becomes fugitive registry. Slave soldiers drag grain sacks onto a wooden cart, wheel cutting mud beside the ancestral tablet box; the woman kneels at the threshold, the child handprint still cold-white with wax. First frame reads sacks just loaded onto the cart; last frame reads the empty threshold, wheel ruts and cold haze after the cart leaves. Emotion stays restrained, with no heroic chase or exaggerated crying. The FLF2V first-to-last frames use the same rear-threshold thirds composition: first frame foreground holds tablet box, cold-white wax handprint and mud water as grain sacks are dragged onto the cart; midground keeps woman and child low at the threshold while slave soldiers and cart wheels exit laterally. By the last frame the cart recedes into cold haze, foreground remains empty threshold, tablet box and wheel ruts: the doorway stands but household grain is gone. Low morning backlight from the cart-exit direction rims sacks, wheels, slave-soldier shoulders and cold haze for cinema and air; side light skims mud water, wheel ruts, tablet box and burlap for tactile texture. Woman and child receive only soft sky light, not hard judgmental light; the insect-wax handprint stays a small cold-white highlight. Tyndall light only follows the cart lane for depth and must not cover the doorway. The cart and slave soldiers exit laterally while the camera does not chase; it holds behind the household threshold with a very slow pullback, stressing that grain leaves while the home remains hollow. Wheel sound overtakes crying at the end.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要追车英雄镜头、不要押车变战车、不要现代车轮、不要夸张哭喊、不要大面积底光火场感、不要圣光式逆光、不要车离开后换地理、不要祖牌盒消失、不要孩子手印变血手印、不要粮袋漂浮、不要泥水塑料感、不要黄色闪粉、数字颗粒、过度丁达尔光、视频涂抹、花屏、压缩块、人物融化。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: avoid heroic cart chase, cart becoming a war chariot, modern wheels, exaggerated crying, broad fire-like bottom light, sacred backlight, geography changing after cart leaves, missing tablet box, child handprint turning bloody, floating sacks, plastic mud water, yellow glitter, digital speckle, excessive Tyndall beams, video smearing, glitches, compression blocks, melting figures.

prompts.prompt_zh: 南方红线密室雨夜桌面建立特写，旧驿残图铺满16:9横屏，南缘在下方前景、北境在上方深处，朱赤红线从下三分之一斜向钉到上三分之一，铜钉、防潮卷轴筒、雨滴、油布边缘和潮湿木桌形成层次。低位油灯从左下侧擦过纸面，温暖窄侧光凸出泛黄纸纤维、红线绒毛、铜钉氧化边和湿木纹；右上方雨夜月白冷反光只点亮水滴、油布折痕和地图裂缝。镜头沿红线真实速度缓慢向北推进并轻微跟焦，红线只是物理线索，不发光、不导航、不出现现代地图字。
prompts.prompt_en: Rainy-night tabletop establishing close-up in the southern red-line room, a damaged old relay map fills the 16:9 frame, south in the lower foreground and the northern border receding upward. A vermilion cord runs diagonally from the lower third to the upper third, with brass pins, moisture-proof scroll tube, rain droplets, oilcloth edge and wet wood table layered clearly. A low oil lamp from lower-left skims the paper as warm narrow side light, revealing aged paper fibers, cord fuzz, oxidized brass edges and wet wood grain; cool moon-white rain bounce from upper-right only lights droplets, oilcloth folds and map cracks. The camera slowly pushes north along the cord with a slight focus pull; the red cord is physical evidence, not glowing, not navigation magic, with no modern map text.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要现代地图标注、不要清晰现代字体、不要电子导航线、不要高魔法发光路线、不要神圣金光、不要过曝 bloom、不要全局灰黑欠曝、不要没有主光方向、不要油灯变舞台聚光、不要丁达尔光柱遮住地图、不要塑料纸面、不要漂浮红线、不要随机文字、不要视频涂抹、花屏、压缩块、数字颗粒、黄色闪粉。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: avoid modern map labels, clean modern typography, electronic navigation line, high-magic glowing route, divine golden light, overexposed bloom, flat grey underexposure, missing key-light direction, oil lamp becoming stage spotlight, Tyndall beams hiding the map, plastic paper surface, floating red cord, random text, video smearing, glitches, compression blocks, digital speckle, yellow glitter.

subject.zh: 旧驿残图、朱赤红线、铜钉、防潮卷轴筒、雨滴、油布边缘和潮湿木桌。
subject.en: Rainy-night tabletop establishing close-up in the southern red-line room, a damaged old relay map fills the 16:9 frame, south in the lower foreground and the northern border receding upward.

composition.zh: 横屏桌面建立特写采用斜上俯角三层构图：旧驿残图占满画面，南缘在下方前景、北境在上方深处；朱赤红线从下三分之一斜向穿到上三分之一，铜钉和防潮卷轴筒压住节奏；油灯只在左下画外留下暖边，雨滴和油布边缘在右上形成冷湿边界。
composition.en: The tabletop establishing close-up uses an overhead-oblique three-layer composition: the damaged relay map fills the frame, south sits in the lower foreground and the northern border recedes upward; the vermilion cord runs diagonally from the lower third to the upper third, paced by brass pins and a moisture-proof scroll tube; the oil lamp stays just off lower-left as a warm edge, while rain dots and oilcloth at upper-right form a cool wet boundary.

camera.zh: 从桌面斜上方沿红线向北做真实速度缓慢推进，轻微跟焦从南缘线钉滑到北境水滴；不旋转地图、不升空、不让红线变成魔法导航光。
camera.en: A slow real-time push from overhead-oblique tabletop height follows the red cord north, with a slight focus pull from the southern pin to the rain dot near the northern mark; no map rotation, no crane-up, and no magical route glow.

lighting_color.zh: 低位油灯从左下侧擦过纸面，形成温暖窄侧光，凸出泛黄纸纤维、朱赤线绒毛、铜钉氧化边和湿木纹；右上方雨夜月白冷反光只点亮水滴、油布折痕和地图裂缝。四角用负补光压暗，保留潮湿暖暗，不做全局提亮。
lighting_color.en: A low oil lamp from lower-left skims the paper as a warm narrow side light, revealing aged paper fibers, vermilion cord fuzz, oxidized brass-pin edges and wet wood grain; cool moon-white rain bounce from upper-right only lights droplets, oilcloth folds and map cracks. Negative fill darkens the corners, preserving humid warm darkness without global brightening.

style_continuity.zh: 南缘遗民的防潮油布、红线仪式和旧礼法残片必须可读；红线是物理路线和政治压力，不是魔法导航。
style_continuity.en: Southern remnant oilcloth, red-cord ritual and old etiquette fragments must remain readable; the red cord is a physical route and political pressure, not magic navigation.

quality_intent.zh: 纸、线、铜、油布、木纹和水滴分材质，前景线钉、中景路线、远端北境标记清楚。
quality_intent.en: Paper, cord, brass, oilcloth, wood grain and droplets separate by material; foreground pins, midground route and distant northern mark stay clear.

prompts.prompt_zh: 南方红线密室桌边双人中近景，红线横在顾怀章和晏南枝之间。顾怀章在油灯侧三分位，身体略前压，袖口压住旧驿图，老手皮肤、薄朱赤外袍、卷轴边和地图纸纹被暖侧光擦亮；晏南枝在阴影侧后半步，遮面、冷灰流亡外袍、黑发红线和手中月白玉片形成冷色焦点。月白玉片反弹窄冷光，只勾出她的指节、面纱边、下颌线和衣料纹理，不完整揭脸。低桌沿锁镜，只有顾怀章压图的手、晏南枝收紧玉片的指节和遮面下颌微动；背景雨夜油布保持湿暗，红线是两人之间的政治边界。
prompts.prompt_en: Southern red-line room table-edge two-shot medium close-up, the red cord lies between Gu Huaizhang and Yan Nanzhi. Gu holds the lamp-side third, leaning slightly forward, sleeve pressing the old relay map, with aged hand skin, thin vermilion robe, scroll edge and map paper grain grazed by warm side light; Yan stands half a step back in shadow, her veil, cold-grey exile robe, black hair with red cord and moon-white jade in hand forming the cool focal point. The jade returns a narrow cool light only on her knuckles, veil edge, jawline and cloth texture, never fully revealing her face. Locked low table-edge frame; only Gu pressing the map, Yan tightening fingers around the jade and slight movement under the veil carry the shot. Rainy oilcloth background stays humid dark, and the red cord is the political boundary between them.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要晏南枝全脸华丽揭示、不要网红脸、不要现代妆容、不要艳俗宫装、不要玉片变法器、不要神圣逆光、不要魔法光柱、不要广域恐怖底光、不要油灯过曝、不要背景全黑吞掉动作、不要红线消失、不要两人站位互换、不要字幕入画、不要精确口型文字、不要视频涂抹、脸部花屏、手指融化、衣料塑料感。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: avoid full glamorous Yan face reveal, influencer face, modern makeup, vulgar palace costume, jade becoming a magic weapon, sacred backlight, magic light shafts, broad horror bottom light, overexposed oil lamp, background blackness swallowing action, missing red cord, swapped character positions, subtitles in frame, exact lip-text generation, video smearing, face glitches, melted fingers, plastic cloth.

subject.zh: 顾怀章灯侧压图，晏南枝阴影侧握月白玉片，红线隔在两人之间。
subject.en: Southern red-line room table-edge two-shot medium close-up, the red cord lies between Gu Huaizhang and Yan Nanzhi.

composition.zh: 桌边双人中近景以红线作画面分割：顾怀章在左侧/灯侧三分位，身体略前压，袖口和旧臣卷轴形成暖色重量；晏南枝在右侧/阴影侧后半步，遮面、冷灰外袍和月白玉片形成冷色焦点。红线横切或斜切两人之间，前景地图边缘、中景双手、背景雨夜油布形成三层空间。
composition.en: The table-edge two-shot uses the red cord as a dividing line: Gu Huaizhang holds the left/lamp-side third, leaning slightly forward, with sleeve and old-minister scroll carrying warm weight; Yan Nanzhi stays half a step back on the right/shadow side, her veil, cold-grey robe and moon-white jade forming the cool focal point. The red cord cuts horizontally or diagonally between them, with foreground map edge, midground hands and background rainy oilcloth as three spatial layers.

camera.zh: 低桌沿锁镜，靠顾怀章压图的手、晏南枝收紧玉片的指节和遮面下颌的微动推进；只做极轻微跟焦，不追脸、不做华丽揭面。
camera.en: Locked low table-edge frame driven by Gu pressing the map, Yan tightening fingers around the jade, and a slight movement under the veil; only a very small focus shift, with no face chase and no glamorous unveiling.

lighting_color.zh: 油灯从顾怀章侧面给暖侧光，擦出老手皮肤、薄朱赤外袍、卷轴边和地图纸纹；晏南枝只吃月白玉片反弹的窄冷光，勾出指节、面纱边、下颌线和冷灰衣料纹理。背景保持湿暗负补光，雨滴小高光提供空气感，不能用圣光或美颜柔光揭全脸。
lighting_color.en: The oil lamp gives Gu a warm side light, grazing aged skin, thin vermilion robe, scroll edge and map paper grain; Yan receives only a narrow cool bounce from the moon-white jade, outlining knuckles, veil edge, jawline and cold-grey cloth texture. The background stays humid-dark with negative fill, small rain highlights add air, and no sacred backlight or beauty soft light reveals the whole face.

style_continuity.zh: 晏南枝保持遮面、冷灰流亡外袍、黑发红线和克制礼法站姿；顾怀章是旧臣压力，不是慈祥引路人。
style_continuity.en: Yan Nanzhi keeps her veil, cold-grey exile robe, black hair with red cord and restrained ritual posture; Gu Huaizhang is old-minister pressure, not a kindly guide.

quality_intent.zh: 暖灯与冷玉分光源，皮肤、薄袍、面纱、玉片、纸纹和雨滴分材质。
quality_intent.en: Warm lamp and cool jade stay separate as light sources, with skin, thin robe, veil, jade, paper grain and raindrops separated by material.

prompts.prompt_zh: 南方红线密室手部插入特写，半卷血牒从顾怀章灯侧推过红线，破损纸纤维、潮痕、旧蜡封、暗红旧印和桌面水痕清晰；晏南枝指尖停在卷轴前一指宽空隙，没有接。前景红线虚焦横过下沿，中景血牒从左侧暖灯区滑向右侧阴影，右后方月白玉片只露一条冷白反光，勾出晏南枝指节和面纱下缘。低位油灯从左侧掠过纸面，阴影侧由玉片提供窄冷光，暖冷交界落在红线和未接触的空隙处。桌面高度极小幅推进后停住，只允许火光、雨影和呼吸微动，旧歌在画外被捂住。
prompts.prompt_en: Southern red-line room hand insert close-up: the half-rolled blood genealogy slides from Gu Huaizhang lamp side across the red cord, with torn paper fibers, moisture stains, old wax seal, dark-red old marks and table water trails clearly visible; Yan Nanzhi fingertips stop one finger-width before the scroll and do not take it. Foreground red cord crosses the lower edge out of focus, midground genealogy moves from warm lamplight at left into right-side shadow, and the moon-white jade at rear-right appears only as a narrow cool reflection outlining Yan knuckles and veil lower edge. A low oil lamp grazes the paper from the left; the jade provides narrow cool light in shadow, and the warm-cool boundary falls on the red cord and untouched gap. A tiny table-height push lands and holds, allowing only fire flicker, rain shadow and breath micro-motion, while the old song is muffled offscreen.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要完整圣旨光效、不要皇权胜利感、不要血牒发光漂浮、不要手突然抓卷、不要手指融化、不要血腥奇观、不要随机可读文字、不要现代纸张、不要塑料蜡封、不要神圣逆光、不要魔法光柱、不要大面积底光、不要全局灰黑欠曝、不要视频涂抹、花屏、压缩块、数字颗粒、黄色闪粉。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: avoid perfect sacred edict glow, triumphant royal legitimacy tone, glowing or floating genealogy, hand suddenly grabbing the scroll, melted fingers, gore spectacle, random readable text, modern paper, plastic wax seal, sacred backlight, magic light shafts, broad bottom light, flat grey underexposure, video smearing, glitches, compression blocks, digital speckle, yellow glitter.

subject.zh: 半卷血牒、未接的指尖、红线、月白玉片冷反光和画外被捂住的旧歌。
subject.en: Southern red-line room hand insert close-up: the half-rolled blood genealogy slides from Gu Huaizhang lamp side across the red cord, with torn paper fibers, moisture stains, old wax seal, dark-red old marks and table water trails clearly visible; Yan Nanzhi fingertips stop one finger-width before the scroll and do not take it.

composition.zh: 手部插入特写以红线和血牒形成双重横向压力：前景红线虚焦横过下沿，中景半卷血牒从左侧暖灯区推向右侧阴影，晏南枝指尖停在卷轴前一指宽处；右后方月白玉片只露冷反光，顾怀章的手从左侧退开，画面中心是未接触的空隙。
composition.en: The hand insert close-up uses the red cord and genealogy as two horizontal pressures: foreground red cord crosses the lower edge out of focus, the half-rolled blood genealogy slides from warm lamplight at left toward right-side shadow, and Yan fingertips stop one finger-width before it; the moon-white jade appears only as a cool reflection in rear-right, Gu hand retreats from left, and the central subject is the untouched gap.

camera.zh: 从桌面高度做极小幅推进，停在“指尖没有接触血牒”的空隙上；推进后保持，允许火光、雨影和呼吸带来微动，不让手突然抓卷。
camera.en: A tiny table-height push lands on the gap where the fingertips do not touch the genealogy; after the push it holds, allowing only fire flicker, rain shadow and breath micro-motion, never letting the hand suddenly grab the scroll.

lighting_color.zh: 低位油灯从左侧掠过血牒，突出破损纸纤维、潮痕、旧蜡封、暗红旧印和桌面水痕；阴影侧由月白玉片提供很窄的冷反光，勾晏南枝指尖和面纱下缘。暖光到冷光的交界落在红线与空隙处，强调她没有接。禁止血牒圣旨化发光。
lighting_color.en: A low oil lamp from the left grazes the genealogy, revealing torn paper fibers, moisture stains, old wax seal, dark-red old marks and table water trails; on the shadow side the moon-white jade provides a very narrow cool reflection on Yan fingertips and veil lower edge. The warm-to-cool boundary falls on the red cord and the gap, stressing that she has not taken it. The genealogy must never glow like a sacred edict.

style_continuity.zh: 血牒是旧帝国合法性与旧债压力，不是胜利圣物；晏南枝的迟疑必须比道具更重要。
style_continuity.en: The blood genealogy is pressure from old-imperial legitimacy and old debt, not a victorious sacred object; Yan Nanzhi hesitation must matter more than the prop.

quality_intent.zh: 纸纤维、蜡封、潮痕、桌面水迹、指节和面纱边缘必须清晰，中心是未接触空隙。
quality_intent.en: Paper fibers, wax seal, moisture stains, table water trails, knuckles and veil edge must stay clear, with the untouched gap as the center.

prompts.prompt_zh: 南方红线密室图形过渡特写，红线北端位于画面上三分之一，雨滴压在朱赤红线和北境旧纸纹交界处，让红线变深、纸面水渍吃开。下方油灯暖边逐渐降低，只照亮红线纤维和水滴边缘；右上月白冷反光给纸面裂缝和晏南枝侧后方遮面剪影一条冷边。贴近地图高度沿红线北端短匹配移动，终帧让红线方向接到残阳坳村口封锁线或白蜡旗线条方向，形成“路”变“封锁”的视觉反转。暖暗逐步让位给土褐与虫蜡冷白，但冷白只读为制度封锁信息，不做圣光。
prompts.prompt_en: Southern red-line room graphic transition close-up: the north end of the red cord sits in the upper third, with a rain droplet pressing on the boundary between vermilion cord and old northern paper grain, darkening the cord and spreading water stain into the page. A low warm lamp edge fades at the bottom, lighting only cord fibers and droplet rims; cool moon-white bounce from upper-right gives paper cracks and Yan veiled side-rear silhouette a narrow cold rim. A short map-level match move follows the red cord north, and the end frame aligns the cord direction with the Canyangao village checkpoint line or white-wax flag line, turning road into blockade. Humid warm darkness gradually yields to earth brown and insect-wax cold white, but the cold white reads only as bureaucratic blockade, never sacred light.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要皇座幻象、不要梦幻溶解、不要字卡解释、不要红线发光变法阵、不要圣光式逆光、不要魔法光柱、不要过曝 bloom、不要全黑转场、不要线条方向断裂、不要跳到无关地点、不要晏南枝完整正脸、不要随机文字、不要油灯舞台化、不要视频涂抹、花屏、压缩块、数字颗粒、黄色闪粉。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: avoid throne vision, dreamy dissolve, explanatory title card, red cord glowing into magic array, sacred backlight, magic light shafts, overexposed bloom, full black transition, broken line direction, cut to unrelated geography, full Yan face reveal, random text, stage-like oil lamp, video smearing, glitches, compression blocks, digital speckle, yellow glitter.

subject.zh: 红线北端、水滴、压暗油灯、晏南枝虚焦剪影和村口封锁线方向。
subject.en: Southern red-line room graphic transition close-up: the north end of the red cord sits in the upper third, with a rain droplet pressing on the boundary between vermilion cord and old northern paper grain, darkening the cord and spreading water stain into the page.

composition.zh: 图形过渡特写把红线北端放在上三分之一，水滴压在红线和北境纸纹交界处；油灯暖边在下方逐渐降低，晏南枝遮面剪影只在侧后方虚焦压住画面边缘。终帧需要让红线方向与残阳坳村口封锁线/白蜡旗线条方向可匹配，形成“路”变“封锁”的视觉反转。
composition.en: The graphic transition close-up places the red cord north end in the upper third, with a droplet pressing on the boundary between cord and northern paper grain; the warm lamp edge lowers at the bottom, and Yan veiled silhouette stays out of focus at the rear side, weighting the frame edge. The end frame must match the red-line direction to the Canyangao checkpoint or white-wax flag line, turning road into blockade.

camera.zh: 贴近地图高度沿红线北端做短匹配移动，最后用线条方向、亮度下降和雨声切人声接到村口封锁线；不做梦幻溶解、不出现皇座幻象。
camera.en: A short map-level match move follows the north end of the red cord, using line direction, dimming exposure and rain-to-crowd audio to cut into the village checkpoint line; no dreamy dissolve and no throne vision.

lighting_color.zh: 雨夜油灯被压暗，只保留低位暖边照亮红线纤维和水滴边缘；右上月白冷反光给纸面裂缝和晏南枝剪影一条冷边。转场尾端让暖暗逐步让位给残阳坳土褐与虫蜡冷白，但冷白只作为封锁线信息，不做圣光。
lighting_color.en: The rainy-night oil lamp dims, leaving only a low warm edge on cord fibers and droplet rims; cool moon-white bounce from upper-right gives paper cracks and Yan silhouette a narrow cold edge. At the transition tail, humid warm darkness yields to Canyangao earth brown and insect-wax cold white, but the cold white is blockade information, never sacred light.

style_continuity.zh: 旧帝国路线期待在这里转成制度封锁压力；不能把结尾做成复国胜利或神秘幻象。
style_continuity.en: The old-imperial route expectation turns into bureaucratic blockade pressure here; the ending must not become royal restoration victory or mystical vision.

quality_intent.zh: 线条方向、红线纤维、水滴边缘、纸裂和冷暖转场必须清楚，转场信息不能被特效吞掉。
quality_intent.en: Line direction, red-cord fibers, droplet edge, paper cracks and warm-to-cool transition must stay readable; transition information must not be swallowed by effects.

prompts.prompt_zh: 残阳坳村口白天，检查桌居中，旧井一侧、药屋一侧、后山出口插三支白蜡旗，奴兵扣腕排队，纯虫族小兵封旧井和药屋外圈，土褐村落与虫蜡冷白冲突。
prompts.prompt_en: Daytime Canyangao gate, inspection table centered, old well on one side, medicine house on the other, three white wax flags marking back-mountain exits, slave soldiers binding wrists, pure insect soldiers sealing well and medicine house perimeter, earth-brown village against cold insect-wax white.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要地理混乱，不要把村民画成同款乞丐，不要现代村口。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No confusing geography, no identical beggar villagers, no modern village gate.

prompts.prompt_zh: 白册官吏站在残阳坳检查桌后，半圆高账吏帽、蜡白灰短官袍、白册夹板、蜡笔针清楚，村民粮袋药篮柴刀堆在低处，逐户复核的冷静制度感。
prompts.prompt_en: Register clerk behind Canyangao inspection table, half-round tall account hat, wax-white-grey short robe, white register board and wax pen needle clear, villagers grain sacks, herb baskets and wood knives piled low, cold procedural household review.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要人族衙役造型，不要官吏低于村民，不要清代官服。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No human yamen clerk look, do not make the official lower than villagers, no Qing dynasty official costume.

prompts.prompt_zh: 沈维桑在人群边背弓站立，左肩微低，灰褐猎衣与草药青内层，视线依次读旧井、后山出口和白蜡旗虫蜡未干，主角观察先于行动。
prompts.prompt_en: Shen Weisang stands at crowd edge with bow, left shoulder slightly low, grey-brown hunter clothes and herb-green inner layer, eyes reading old well, back-mountain exit and wet wax on flags in sequence, protagonist observation before action.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要少年战神姿势，不要拔弓动作过早，不要美化左肩旧伤。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No young war-god pose, no early bow draw, do not glamorize the left shoulder injury.

prompts.prompt_zh: 沈照眠抱着小草药袋在人群缝隙里抬头，浅灰短襦、草药绿小围裙，听见古旧地名后下意识接半句禁歌，成人身体形成狭窄压迫框。
prompts.prompt_en: Shen Zhaomian lifts her head through a gap in the crowd, small herb bag clutched, pale grey short robe and herb-green apron, reflexively continuing a forbidden song after hearing an old place name, adult bodies forming a narrow pressure frame.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要恐怖附身表情，不要儿童奇观化，不要过度干净。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No possessed horror expression, no child spectacle, no over-clean look.

prompts.prompt_zh: 罗青禾一步挡到沈照眠身前，青布头巾、草药绿围裙、小铜剪在手，白册官吏复眼高处转向她，母亲保护线和制度审视同框。
prompts.prompt_en: Luo Qinghe steps in front of Zhaomian, blue cloth headscarf, herb-green apron, small copper scissors in hand, the register clerk compound eyes turn toward her from above, maternal protection line and institutional scrutiny in one frame.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要把罗青禾画成普通苍老村妇，不要动作过度武打化。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: Do not render Luo as an ordinary aged village woman, no over-martial action.

prompts.prompt_zh: 沈维桑挤出半真半假的笑，把沈照眠草药袋勾到自己脚边，指腹按住猎弓弓弦，灰褐猎衣在人群边缘，白册官吏压在画面另一侧。
prompts.prompt_en: Shen Weisang forces a half-true smile, hooks Zhaomian herb bag to his foot, fingertip pressing his hunter bowstring, grey-brown hunter clothes at crowd edge, register clerk pressure on the opposite side of frame.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要热血反击，不要拔箭，不要让他笑得轻松。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No hot-blooded counterattack, no arrow draw, do not make his smile easy.

prompts.prompt_zh: 白册纸面宏观特写，沈家户名位于中心，淡白虫蜡纹从纸纤维里渗出，蜡笔针停在旁注位置，冷白制度记录感，文字需后期或遮罩重绘精确处理。
prompts.prompt_en: Macro close-up of white register paper, Shen household name centered, pale insect-wax veins seeping through paper fibers, wax pen needle paused at side-note area, cold bureaucratic record feeling, text must be precise through post or masked redraw.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要随机文字，不要魔法符文乱飞，不要发光书页。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No random text, no flying magic runes, no glowing book page.

prompts.prompt_zh: 清明香插进检查桌裂缝，冷白细烟升起，沈维桑、罗青禾、沈照眠在不同层次同时看向香，桌木旧褐、虫蜡白、压低人群声。
prompts.prompt_en: Qingming incense inserted into the crack of the inspection table, thin cold-white smoke rising, Shen Weisang, Luo Qinghe and Zhaomian looking at the incense on different depth layers, old brown table wood, insect-wax white, crowd sound lowered.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要浓烟遮挡，不要香变法术，不要火焰夸张。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No thick blocking smoke, do not turn incense into magic, no exaggerated flame.

prompts.prompt_zh: 清明香烟线贴地被风压向药屋，白蜡旗虫蜡未干，药屋门外纯虫族小兵爪足停住，地面视角从村口过渡到药屋，环境声被木门隔住。
prompts.prompt_en: Qingming incense smoke crawls low toward the medicine house under wind, wet wax on white flags, pure insect soldier clawed feet stopping outside the medicine-house door, ground-level view transitioning from village gate to medicine house, sound muffled by wood door.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要烟线变灵蛇，不要药屋位置跳变，不要虫兵怪物化抢戏。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: Do not turn smoke into spirit snake, no medicine-house position jump, no insect soldier monster spectacle.

prompts.prompt_zh: 罗青禾药屋暗格内主观视角，木缝横切画面，晏南枝遮面眼睛在暗处，手按月白玉片，门外虫族小兵爪足停在冷白门缝光里，低声呼吸。
prompts.prompt_en: Inside Luo medicine house cabinet compartment POV, wood slit cutting the frame, veiled Yan Nanzhi eyes in darkness, hand pressing moon-white jade, insect soldier clawed feet stopped in cold door-slit light outside, low breathing.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要正面露晏南枝完整脸，不要暗格过亮，不要现代柜子。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No full frontal Yan face reveal, do not overlight the compartment, no modern cabinet.

prompts.prompt_zh: 罗青禾在药屋内抓药，青布头巾、草药绿围裙、药剪和药包动作稳定，她站在门与药柜暗格之间，门缝冷白切入草药青室内。
prompts.prompt_en: Luo Qinghe gathers medicine inside the medicine house, blue headscarf, herb-green apron, steady scissors and packet movement, standing between door and cabinet compartment, cold door-slit light cutting into herb-green interior.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要慌乱夸张动作，不要现代药房器具，不要削弱罗青禾稳定感。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No exaggerated panic motion, no modern pharmacy objects, do not weaken Luo steadiness.

prompts.prompt_zh: 药柜木缝分割近景，晏南枝在黑暗前景低声发问，罗青禾侧脸在外侧虚焦但眼神清醒，月白玉片冷光压在晏南枝手心，身份带来现实代价。
prompts.prompt_en: Medicine cabinet slit split close-up, Yan Nanzhi in dark foreground asking softly, Luo Qinghe side face soft outside but clear-eyed, cold moon-white jade light in Yan palm, identity carrying real cost.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要浪漫对视，不要宫廷美图，不要把罗青禾画成冷血反派。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No romantic gaze, no palace beauty shot, do not make Luo a cold villain.

prompts.prompt_zh: 药柜底板插入特写，罗青禾手指拂开草药灰，旧驿暗号和日月残纹从旧木板上露出，残纹克制、磨损、非发光，晏南枝指尖停在边缘。
prompts.prompt_en: Medicine cabinet bottom-board insert close-up, Luo fingers wiping aside herb ash, old relay sign and sun-moon remnant emerging from old wood, restrained worn non-glowing mark, Yan fingertip paused near edge.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要发光法阵，不要随机符号，不要把旧驿暗号画成现代 logo。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No glowing magic array, no random symbols, do not make the relay mark a modern logo.

prompts.prompt_zh: 罗青禾把底板压回药柜，声音压低，门外封门奴兵敲门，叉矛影落在柜门上，虫蜡冷白从门缝进入室内，皇旗会让村庄变反寨的现实压力。
prompts.prompt_en: Luo presses the board back into the cabinet, voice low, sealed-door slave soldier knocking outside, fork spear shadow falling across cabinet door, insect-wax cold white entering through door slit, the real pressure that an imperial flag would turn the village into a rebel den.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要外面冲进来，不要武打化，叉矛影要清楚但不夸张。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No soldier bursting in, no martial-action exaggeration, spear shadow clear but not overdone.

prompts.prompt_zh: 残阳坳旧井旁午后，村民被赶到井边，药屋门框挂上虫蜡封门牌，沈维桑视线从药屋窗缝迅速转向后山风口，地理关系清楚。
prompts.prompt_en: Afternoon beside Canyangao old well, villagers driven to the well, insect-wax seal hanging on medicine-house doorframe, Shen Weisang eyeline moving from medicine-house window slit to back-mountain wind gap, geography clearly readable.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要旧井和药屋位置混乱，不要人群遮住关键道具。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No confused well/medicine-house location, do not let crowd hide key props.

prompts.prompt_zh: 检查桌上摆着药柜底板旧驿暗号，草药灰被虫蜡反光压住，白册官吏高在桌后宣布窝户和封村，村民在下方被制度语言压低。
prompts.prompt_en: Old relay-mark cabinet board lies on the inspection table, herb ash suppressed by insect-wax reflection, register clerk high behind table declaring harboring and village seal, villagers below compressed by bureaucratic language.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要把暗号变大型法器，不要让官吏亲自施暴。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: Do not turn the mark into a large magic object, do not have the clerk personally attack.

prompts.prompt_zh: 旧井边人群炸开，白册官吏仍站桌后开册，混血奴兵扣住少年和押绳，纯虫族小兵用钩镰堵死退路，三层抓捕职责清楚，硬午后光。
prompts.prompt_en: Crowd erupts beside the old well, register clerk still behind table with register open, mixed-blood slave soldiers holding boys and ropes, pure insect soldiers blocking exits with hooks, three arrest roles clear, hard afternoon light.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要混成一团怪物，不要血腥混战，不要镜头糊掉层级。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: Do not merge into one monster mass, no bloody melee, do not blur hierarchy.

prompts.prompt_zh: 沈照眠被吓得摸草药袋，沈维桑手伸来未及拉住，白册蜡笔先在纸上记下疑童，草药袋生活色与冷白纸面形成对比，儿童威胁克制。
prompts.prompt_en: Zhaomian frightened hand touches herb bag, Shen hand reaches but cannot pull her first, wax pen marks suspect child on white register paper, living color of herb bag against cold white paper, child threat restrained.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要儿童受伤画面，不要随机文字，不要恐怖儿童表情。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No child injury image, no random text, no horror child expression.

prompts.prompt_zh: 白翳从村口直线入场，极高瘦、无尘虫蜡白官服、高筒清明官帽、骨白硬领、半透明薄翼披肩，暗色复眼，风尘不沾衣角，村民自然让开。
prompts.prompt_en: Bai Yi enters straight through village gate, extremely tall and thin, spotless insect-wax white official robe, tall Qingming hat, bone-white hard collar, translucent wing-like shoulder mantle, dark compound eyes, dust not touching robe, villagers part naturally.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要怪物咆哮，不要大翅膀奇观，不要普通白衣人。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No roaring monster, no large wing spectacle, no ordinary white-robed human.

prompts.prompt_zh: 白翳停在检查桌前擦拭虫蜡针，旧驿暗号在桌上，白册冷白反光，白翳脸部安静无怒，用制度推理判断有人开门带路。
prompts.prompt_en: Bai Yi stops at inspection table wiping the insect-wax needle, old relay mark on the table, cold register reflection, Bai Yi face quiet and without anger, using institutional reasoning to infer someone opened a door and guided the path.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要表情狰狞，不要毒针绿光，不要审讯室现代感。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No snarling expression, no green poison needle glow, no modern interrogation room feeling.

prompts.prompt_zh: 虫蜡针点住白册沈家户名，冷白旁注一点点渗出“祖账未清，疑连昭明旧驿”，随后切到沈维桑眼神冷下，文字必须后期或遮罩重绘。
prompts.prompt_en: Insect-wax needle touches Shen family name in the white register, cold side note slowly seeps out reading ancestral account unclear, suspected link to Zhaoming relay, then cut to Shen eyes going cold; text must be post or masked redraw.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要模型随机汉字，不要魔法爆光，不要把白册做成电子屏。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No random generated Chinese text, no magic burst light, do not make the register an electronic screen.

prompts.prompt_zh: 旧井口成为审讯中心，虫族小兵向井口收拢，白蜡旗被压紧，奴兵把村民推回井边低处，封村清户搜旧井从命令变成空间动作。
prompts.prompt_en: Old well becomes interrogation center, insect soldiers close toward the well, white wax flags pressed tight, slave soldiers push villagers low beside the well, seal village, clear households and search well become spatial action.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要搜井提前变战斗，不要地理跳位，不要大规模暴力。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: Do not turn well search into battle early, no geography jump, no large-scale violence.

prompts.prompt_zh: 白翳翻到白册新页高在后景，沈照眠被奴兵拉出半步在前景，草药袋晃起，沈维桑侧面手部扣住猎弓弦，孩子与弓弦之间形成克制压力。
prompts.prompt_en: Bai Yi turns to a new register page high in background, Zhaomian pulled half a step forward by slave soldier in foreground, herb bag swinging, Shen side hand hooks hunter bowstring, restrained pressure between child and bowstring.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要射箭动作完成，不要儿童受伤，不要白翳怒吼。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: No completed arrow shot, no child injury, no Bai Yi shouting.

prompts.prompt_zh: 极近景沈维桑拇指扣住弓弦又缓缓松开，罗青禾隔人群极轻摇头，沈照眠低处虚焦，白册翻页声像骨钟回声，弓弦冷光一点后切黑。
prompts.prompt_en: Extreme close-up of Shen thumb hooking bowstring then slowly releasing, Luo Qinghe gives a tiny head shake across the crowd, Zhaomian blurred low, register page turn echoes like bone bell, one cold glint on string then hard cut to black.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_zh: 不要松弦变射击，不要英雄慢动作，不要过度眼泪煽情。
prompts.negative_prompt_notes_en: Do not turn release into shooting, no heroic slow motion, no excessive tear melodrama.
